name: hydrus1d
description: Codex plugin and MCP server for HYDRUS-1D water flow and solute transport workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Run and analyze HYDRUS-1D water and solute projects.
interface.longDescription: Provides a local MCP server and Codex skill for inspecting, running, validating, calibrating, and interpreting HYDRUS-1D water flow and salinity/solute transport simulations.
